content.thinking: Let me also check the CPU info properly and get a better system resource snapshot.

arguments.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Processor | Select-Object Name, LoadPercentage, NumberOfCores | Format-Table -AutoSize

$os = Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem; $mem = [math]::Round($os.TotalVisibleMemorySize/1MB, 1); $free = [math]::Round($os.FreePhysicalMemory/1MB, 1); Write-Host "RAM Total: ${mem}GB | Free: ${free}GB | Used: $([math]::Round($mem-$free,1))GB"
